atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports significant pain at the end of his right middle finger.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient attributes the injury to a motor vehicle accident approximately five days prior.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient describes being rear-ended while stopped at a four-way stop.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient attributes the injury to an incident involving flipping someone off.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: An X-ray reveals a distal phalanx fracture of the middle finger.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Physical examination reveals tenderness over the distal phalanx of the right middle finger.

atomic_propositions.speaker: unknown
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient's primary problem is a distal phalanx fracture of the middle finger, likely secondary to a motor vehicle accident.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician is prescribing tramadol 50 mg every six hours as needed for pain for two days.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician is prescribing an eight-count tramadol tablet supply.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician will provide a finger splint.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: A follow-up x-ray is scheduled in two weeks.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician will counsel the patient to take the prescribed medications as directed.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician will advise the patient to monitor for any worsening of symptoms.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician will advise him to avoid activities that could further injure the finger.
